title_zh: A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits
title_en: A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits
summary_zh: 给 residual stream、attention head、composition 和 path expansion 一个统一语言，是后续 tracing 和 circuit 讨论的总框架。
summary_en: Provides a single language for residual streams, attention heads, composition, and path expansion, and acts as the general frame for later tracing and circuit work.
why_now_zh: 当你已经做完 M06 之后，这篇能把你从“会读一张图”推进到“会说一个一般框架”。
why_now_en: After M06, this moves you from 'I can read one graph' to 'I can speak the general framework.'
assignment_zh: 写 1 页 framework brief，并把 M06 里的一个 toy trace 用 residual-stream 与 composition 语言重述。
assignment_en: Write a one-page framework brief and restate one M06 toy trace using residual-stream and composition language.

summary_zh: 把 induction 作为具体电路对象来研究，是理解 transformer 为什么能复制模式和形成 in-context behavior 的经典入口。
summary_en: Studies induction as a concrete circuit object and is a classic entry point to why transformers can copy patterns and support in-context behavior.
why_now_zh: 它把 attention 读图、circuit 语言和具体行为现象连起来，是进入经典 transformer circuits 的第一站。
why_now_en: It connects attention reading, circuit language, and a concrete behavioral phenomenon, making it a first stop for classic transformer-circuits work.
assignment_zh: 做一个最小复制任务的阅读笔记，并说明 induction head 为什么比单个 attention 热点更像“机制”。
assignment_en: Make a reading note for a minimal copying task and explain why an induction head is more like a mechanism than a single attention hotspot.

title_zh: Interpretability in the Wild: a Circuit for Indirect Object Identification in GPT-2 Small
title_en: Interpretability in the Wild: a Circuit for Indirect Object Identification in GPT-2 Small
summary_zh: 把电路分析从 toy 任务推进到自然语言里的具体行为现象，是“从论文图到真实行为任务”的关键过渡。
summary_en: Pushes circuit analysis from toy settings into a concrete natural-language behavior, making it a key bridge from paper diagrams to real tasks.
why_now_zh: 做完 Anthropic 主线后，这篇能逼你处理更脏的行为定义、更多的头和更复杂的证据链。
why_now_en: After the Anthropic core path, this forces you to handle messier behavior definitions, more heads, and a longer evidence chain.
assignment_zh: 写 1 份 IOI evidence chain 速记，指出这类行为任务比 M06 toy trace 多了哪些不确定性。
assignment_en: Write one IOI evidence-chain brief and state which uncertainties appear here that were absent in the M06 toy trace.

title_zh: Auditing Language Models for Hidden Objectives
title_en: Auditing Language Models for Hidden Objectives
summary_zh: 把 interpretability、behavior evaluation 和 auditing 连起来，提醒你研究目标不只是“看懂”，还包括找出模型隐藏优化目标。
summary_en: Connects interpretability, behavior evaluation, and auditing, and reminds you that the goal is not only to understand but also to detect hidden optimization targets.
why_now_zh: 如果你的终点是公司研究，这篇能把 feature、tracing 和 safety 研究的接口放到同一张图里。
why_now_en: If company research is the goal, this places features, tracing, and safety-facing auditing in one frame.
assignment_zh: 写 1 份 auditing memo，说明如果怀疑模型有隐藏目标，你会先看哪些行为信号、哪些内部证据、哪些停机标准。
assignment_en: Write one auditing memo describing which behavioral signals, internal evidence, and stop conditions you would inspect first if you suspected a hidden objective.
